content.text:
Looking at the image, the track curves to the right ahead with the dashed center line visible curving rightward, and the car appears well-positioned on the track following the curve.

**Waypoint analysis:**
- nearest_waypoints[1] = 24, target index = (24+5) % 121 = 29
- Target WP29: x=7.1725, y=1.2770
- Car: x=6.6131, y=0.7527, heading=11.232°
- dy = 1.2770 - 0.7527 = 0.5243, dx = 7.1725 - 6.6131 = 0.5594
- bearing = atan2(0.5243, 0.5594) = 43.17°
- delta = 43.17 - 11.232 = +31.94° → left (positive = steer left)

**Boundary check:**
- track_width/2 = 0.3781m, distance_from_center = 0.00459m
- is_left_of_center = false (slightly right of center)
- edge_distance (right) = 0.3781 - 0.00459 = 0.3735m → well clear

Delta ~+31.94° → |delta| 30-50°, speed=1.0-1.5, steering_angle=15-20. Use steering_angle=15 at speed=1.5 (delta near lower bound of range).

```json
{
  "reasoning": "Track curves right ahead, WP29 bearing gives delta ~+31.9° (left), maintaining steering_angle=15 at speed=1.5 to follow the right curve while well-centered on track.",
  "knowledge": [
    "Track starts with a long straight along y≈0.683 before curving right around x=6.3-7.3.",
    "Big right curve begins around WP22-30 (x~6.3-7.2, y increases from 0.7 to 1.4).",
    "After the right curve, track loops back along y≈2.77 heading left.",
    "Track total length ~17.7m, 121 waypoints.",
    "Use steering_angle=0 on straights to avoid oscillation.",
    "Prefer speed 1.5 on straights and gentle curves.",
    "Car heading ~11° (nearly due east), well-centered on track.",
    "Right curve ahead requires progressive left steering (positive delta) to follow waypoints.",
    "Steering_angle=15 at speed=1.5 is appropriate for delta ~30-35°.",
    "No objects on track detected, boundary well clear on both sides."
  ],
  "movement_analysis": {
    "x": [6.3170, 6.4162, 6.5293, 6.6131],
    "y": [0.6766, 0.6890, 0.7205, 0.7527],
    "heading": [1.007, 2.450, 7.069, 11.232]
  },
  "waypoint_analysis": "Target WP29 at (7.172, 1.277): bearing=43.17°, delta=+31.94° → moderate-left steer.",
  "speed": 1.5,
  "steering_angle": 15.0
}
```
